heading: Review of quota; review committee
label: 1363 Review of quota; review committee
text: Any farmer who is dissatisfied with his farm marketing quota may, within fifteen days after mailing to him of notice as provided in , have such quota reviewed by a local review committee composed of three farmers from the same or nearby counties appointed by the Secretary. Such committee shall not include any member of the local committee which determined the farm acreage allotment, the normal yield, or the farm marketing quota for such farm. Unless application for review is made within such period, the original determination of the farm marketing quota shall be final.section 1362 of this title
notes: Amendments1951—Act , provided that the Secretary appoint a local review committee composed of 3 farmers from the same or nearby counties.Apr. 12, 1951

Review of 1950 Cotton Farm Acreage Allotment, , provided that any farmer dissatisfied with his farm acreage allotment for the 1950 cotton crop could have such allotment reviewed in accordance with the provisions of this chapter.Act Mar. 31, 1950, ch. 81, § 264 Stat. 41
